list.vod_content: LA crime drama pits master thief Coltrane Wilder against detective Isaiah Stiles, challenging heist genre norms while examining what drives, sustains, and destroys people.

list.vod_content:
م€€م€€Series two will reunite us with Detective Sergeant Mackenzie â€کMackâ€™ Clarke (Anna Samson), whoâ€™s longing to get back to the UK and the life sheâ€™s always craved. But for now sheâ€™s stuck in Dolphin Cove, dodging her ex-fiancأ©e Glennâ€™s (Tai Hara) upcoming wedding after overhearing his unexpected declaration of love in the series one finale â€“ a confession that she canâ€™t unhear.
م€€م€€Luckily for Mack, her compulsion to solve impossible cases serves as a great distraction, and thereâ€™s no shortage of murders to investigate. From the literary world to state-of-the-art shark labs, dating apps and rock concerts, Mack and her team face challenging mysteries with their unique blend of humour and tenacity. But Mackâ€™s biggest challenge of all? Finding a way to exist in Dolphin Cove as the ultimate outsider.
